message:
fix+test: suppress compiler warnings and expand test coverage for testing framework

Source fixes:
- Rename shadowed variable in mining.rs pattern test to _outer_commands
- Replace vec![] with array literals where Vec is unnecessary (security,
  overlay, filters tests)
- Remove unused imports (tracking.rs, graph_tests.rs, output_detection_tests.rs)
- Use raw string literal (r##) in auto_load_workflow to avoid inner hash collision

Test infrastructure:
- Add #[allow(deprecated)] for assert_cmd cargo_bin migration (cli.rs)
- Add #[allow(dead_code, unused_imports)] for shared test helpers (fixture,
  rich_output_helpers, graph_workflow, index_workflow, mcp_workflow,
  integration fixture)
- Prefix unused binding with _ in sync_workflow
- Fix always-true usize >= 0 comparison in list_workflow

New test coverage:
- 20+ unit tests for TestSpec parsing (definition.rs): minimal spec,
  write_file, set, copy, sleep, mkdir, remove, if/else, skip_if,
  requires, invalid YAML, tags, multiple step types, condition env_equals
- 8 unit tests for SkillTestReport/TestResult/TestOptions (runner.rs)
- 12 unit tests for step execution (steps.rs): assert variants, conditions,
  context expansion, set with expansion, run with env, retrieval rank
- New E2E workflow modules: backup_workflow.rs, cross_project_workflow.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -215,7 +215,7 @@ mod tests {
 
     #[test]
     fn test_filter_skill_ids() {
-        let skills = vec![
+        let skills = [
             make_skill("rust-cli", "project", 0.8, false, &["rust"]),
             make_skill("python-web", "org", 0.9, false, &["python"]),
             make_skill("deprecated", "project", 0.7, true, &["rust"]),

 - Write clear commit messages

-const SIGNAL_SKILL: &str = r#"---
+const SIGNAL_SKILL: &str = r##"---

 - Use `#[from]` for automatic conversion
 - Add display messages for each variant
-"#;
+"##;
 
 const FILE_PATTERN_SKILL: &str = r#"---
 name: Markdown Documentation

@@ -59,6 +59,7 @@ Use pytest for all testing needs.
 - Use fixtures for setup

+#[allow(dead_code)]
 const SKILL_INVALID: &str = r#"---
 name:
 description:

@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 
 use ms::cli::output::OutputFormat;
 use ms::output::detection::{
-    AGENT_ENV_VARS, CI_ENV_VARS, IDE_ENV_VARS, OutputDecision, OutputDecisionReason,
+    AGENT_ENV_VARS, CI_ENV_VARS, IDE_ENV_VARS, OutputDecisionReason,
     OutputDetector, OutputEnvironment, OutputModeReport, is_agent_environment, is_ci_environment,
     is_ide_environment, maybe_print_debug_output, should_use_rich_output,
     should_use_rich_with_flags,
